title: Richly Spiced Middle Eastern Lamb Shawarma
description: A kid-friendly Middle Eastern dish featuring lamb, bok choi, and rich spices, served in a shawarma format, this recipe is low-fat-friendly and perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, cumin, coriander, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the sliced lamb to the bowl and toss to coat with the spice mixture.
Grill the lamb for 5 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 145 degrees.
Grill the chopped bok choi for 2 minutes per side, or until it is slightly charred.
Warm the pita bread by wrapping it in foil and heating it on the grill for 1 minute.
Assemble the shawarma by slicing the grilled lamb and placing it in the pita bread with the grilled bok choi and a dollop of tahini sauce.
